absorber_nulls.null_model: fixed Hilbert/state space with evolving state or access maps
absorber_nulls.rejection_condition: candidate cannot factor through fixed H_infty while preserving records

absorber_nulls.null_model: fixed observable algebra with subalgebra, context, or representation changes
absorber_nulls.rejection_condition: candidate supplies non-isomorphic algebra/admissibility not representable in A_infty

absorber_nulls.null_model: fixed POVM/channel/instrument family plus protocol selection
absorber_nulls.rejection_condition: candidate's instrument or observable type is source-generated, not selected

absorber_nulls.null_model: fixed stochastic, collapse, or open-system law
absorber_nulls.rejection_condition: candidate cannot be reproduced as sampling or collapse inside a fixed law

absorber_nulls.null_model: fixed richer boundary/source containing the trace
absorber_nulls.rejection_condition: candidate blocks precontainment by a boundary or completed source object

absorber_nulls.null_model: fixed richer Mu_infty plus changing observer/process access
absorber_nulls.rejection_condition: candidate changes source admissibility rather than access to pre-existing structure

absorber_nulls.null_model: new observables introduced by measurement design or modeler vocabulary
absorber_nulls.rejection_condition: candidate shows the physical source forms the new class without experimenter addition

adapter_contract.acceptance_rule: A real physical candidate passes only if all adapter fields map, at least one W1-W3 source-growth core witness is supplied, W4-W6 absorber controls are supplied, every fixed-source absorber is defeated, no hidden oracle remains, and the new class is source-generated rather than experimenter-added.

target.Gamma_n: physical source context available at prefix n
target.Gamma_n_plus_1: successor source context after accepted extension
target.tau_n: recordable source trace sufficient for projection/finality audit

candidate_controls.description: A predictive-to-accessible physical trace that maps records but remains fixed-H, fixed-A, fixed-instrument readout.
A schematic, not-yet-instantiated shape showing the contract is satisfiable if a future candidate supplies W1-W6 and defeats every fixed-source null.

candidate_evaluations.reason: no W1-W3 source-growth core witness supplied
schematic adapter shape passes but is not a real physical candidate

comparisons.negative_fixed_h_reason: no W1-W3 source-growth core witness supplied

verdict.best_result: A non-circular Adapter_P contract can be stated. It rejects fixed-H/readout controls and admits only candidates that supply a W1-W3 source-growth core, W4-W6 absorber controls, no hidden oracle, source generation, and fixed-source absorber defeat.

witness_gates.name: non_isomorphic_algebra
witness_gates.requirement: A_{n+1} is not isomorphic to a restriction, subalgebra, completion, representation change, or coarse-graining of fixed A_infty while preserving records.

witness_gates.name: new_admissibility_predicate
witness_gates.requirement: Adm_{n+1} decides a new observable, instrument, or construction class not decidable or pre-enumerable by Adm_infty.

witness_gates.name: construction_space_growth
witness_gates.requirement: The physical source constructs an observable or instrument type whose construction term was not present in the prior physical/source formalism.

witness_gates.name: perturbation_non_factorization
witness_gates.requirement: Perturbation effects cannot be reproduced by parameter, coupling, channel, decoherence, collapse-rate, or biochemical changes inside fixed structure.

witness_gates.name: record_preservation
witness_gates.requirement: The growing-structure reading preserves the same record maps and observed perturbation effects better than every fixed-H absorber.

witness_gates.name: gauge_absorption_pass
witness_gates.requirement: The claimed growth is not an observer-name change, schema relabeling, measurement-context bookkeeping, or AB-style fixed-cover contextuality effect.
